title: Sort imports according to PEP 8 / isort
description: Reorders imports in the main module to comply with PEP 8 import ordering: standard library, third-party, local.
diff:
diff --git a/app/main.py b/app/main.py
index 3c4d5e6..f7a8b9c 100644
--- a/app/main.py
+++ b/app/main.py
@@ -1,8 +1,9 @@
-from app.utils import format_output
-import os
-from flask import Flask
 import json
+import os
+
+from flask import Flask
 
+from app.utils import format_output
 
 app = Flask(__name__)
author: frank
